# Pull Request Template

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New spoof module
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / repository maintenance
- [ ] Other

## Testing

- [ ] Built locally on Windows x64
- [ ] Tested `status` command
- [ ] Tested `backup` / `restore` flow
- [ ] No secrets or binaries committed

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project style in CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
